otp.subject: Your verification code
otp.message: You need a verification code to {{actionDescription}}.
otp.warning: ⚠️ This code is valid for 10 minutes. Do not share it with anyone.
otp.info: If you did not request this action, you can ignore this message or contact our support team.

verify_email.subject: Your email verification link
verify_email.title: Welcome to Bookealo! 🎉
verify_email.message: Thank you for signing up with us.
verify_email.verifyMessage: To get started, please verify your email address by clicking the button below.
verify_email.info: 💡 If you did not request this verification, you can safely ignore this message.

success.title: Your Business Was Verified! 🎉
success.message: Great news! Your business {{businessName}} has been successfully verified and is now active on our platform.
success.submessage: You can now start receiving appointments and managing your business from your dashboard.
success.info: 💡 Your business is now visible to all Bookealo users. Start receiving appointments!

failed.title: Verification Failed
failed.message: Unfortunately, we couldn't verify your business {{businessName}}.
failed.submessage: Please review the submitted information and try again. If you need help, our support team is available to assist you.
failed.info: 💡 Make sure all provided information is correct and up to date.

change_password.subject: Your Password Has Changed
change_password.title: Password Updated ✅
change_password.message: This is a confirmation that your password has been successfully updated.
change_password.submessage: Your account is now protected with your new password.
change_password.warningMessage: If you did not make this change, please contact our support team immediately. Your security is our priority.
change_password.info: 💡 To keep your account secure, we recommend using a unique and strong password that you don't share with anyone.

success.title: Your Email Was Verified! 🎉
success.message: Your email address has been successfully verified and is now active on our platform.
success.submessage: You can now enjoy all Bookealo features with your verified account.
success.info: 💡 Your account is fully verified and ready to use. Welcome to Bookealo!

failed.title: Verification Failed
failed.message: Unfortunately, we couldn't verify your email address.
failed.submessage: Please review the information and try again. If you need help, our support team is available to assist you.
failed.info: 💡 Make sure to click on the verification link we sent to your email address.

membership_reminder.subject: Your Membership Expiring Soon ⏰
membership_reminder.title: Membership Reminder
membership_reminder.message: We inform you that your membership is about to expire.
membership_reminder.trialMessage: Your free trial period is about to end. To continue enjoying all Bookealo features, we recommend renewing your membership.
membership_reminder.paidMessage: Your paid membership is about to expire. To avoid service interruptions, we recommend renewing before the expiration date.
membership_reminder.actionMessage: Click the button below to renew your membership and continue enjoying all the benefits.
membership_reminder.info: 💡 If you renew before the expiration date, you won't lose access to any features. If you have questions, our support team is available to help you.

payment_failed.subject: Membership Payment Failed ❌
payment_failed.title: Payment Failed
payment_failed.message: We regret to inform you that your membership payment could not be processed.
payment_failed.submessage: Your membership has been temporarily deactivated. To reactivate your account and continue enjoying all features, please update your payment method.
payment_failed.actionMessage: Click the button below to update your payment method and reactivate your membership.
payment_failed.info: 💡 If you're having issues with your payment method, verify that your card is active and has sufficient funds. If you need help, our support team is available to assist you.
payment_failed.warning: ⚠️ Important: Your access to premium features has been suspended until the payment issue is resolved.

payment_succeeded.subject: Membership Payment Successful ✅
payment_succeeded.title: Payment Confirmed!
payment_succeeded.message: Great news! Your membership payment has been processed successfully.
payment_succeeded.submessage: Your membership is active and you can continue enjoying all Bookealo features.
payment_succeeded.info: 💡 Thank you for trusting Bookealo. Your membership is active and ready to use.

deposit_payment_confirmed.subject: Deposit Payment Confirmation ✅
deposit_payment_confirmed.title: Deposit Payment Confirmed!
deposit_payment_confirmed.message: Your deposit payment has been processed successfully.
deposit_payment_confirmed.submessage: Your appointment has been confirmed. We look forward to seeing you at the scheduled date and time.
deposit_payment_confirmed.info: 💡 This deposit secures your reservation. The remaining payment will be made at the time of service.

payment_reminder.subject: Reminder: Complete Your Reservation Payment ⏰
payment_reminder.title: Payment Reminder
payment_reminder.message: You have a pending deposit payment for your reservation.
payment_reminder.submessage: To confirm your appointment, please complete the deposit payment. Your reservation will be automatically cancelled if payment is not completed within the next few hours.
payment_reminder.info: ⚠️ Important: If you do not complete the payment within the next few hours, your reservation will be automatically cancelled and the time slot will become available for other customers.

refund_confirmation.subject: Refund Confirmation ✅
refund_confirmation.title: Refund Processed
refund_confirmation.message: Your refund has been processed successfully.
refund_confirmation.submessage: The refunded amount will appear in your original payment method within 5-10 business days.
refund_confirmation.info: 💡 The refund will be automatically processed to your original payment method. If you have questions, our support team is available to help you.
refund_confirmation.feeInfo: ⚠️ Important: The platform fee is not refunded. Only the amount received by the business is refunded.

no_refund.subject: Appointment Cancellation - No Refund ⚠️
no_refund.title: Cancellation Without Refund
no_refund.message: Your appointment has been successfully cancelled.
no_refund.submessage: Unfortunately, according to our refund policy, it is not possible to refund the deposit due to the cancellation timing.
no_refund.policyInfo: 📋 Refund Policy: Refunds are only available if you cancel more than 24 hours in advance. When cancelling with less notice, the deposit cannot be refunded.

subscription_canceled.subject: Membership Canceled
subscription_canceled.title: Membership Canceled
subscription_canceled.message: We inform you that your membership has been canceled.
subscription_canceled.submessage: {{#if cancelAtPeriodEnd}}Your membership will remain active until the end of the current billing period ({{expiryDate}}). After that date, you will lose access to premium features.{{else}}Your access to premium features has been suspended immediately.{{/if}}
subscription_canceled.actionMessage: If you change your mind, you can reactivate your membership at any time.
subscription_canceled.info: 💡 If you have questions about the cancellation or wish to reactivate your membership, our support team is available to help you.

subscription_activated.subject: Membership Activated! 🎉
subscription_activated.title: Welcome to Bookealo Premium!
subscription_activated.message: Congratulations! Your membership has been successfully activated.
subscription_activated.submessage: You can now enjoy all premium features of Bookealo.
subscription_activated.info: 💡 Thank you for trusting Bookealo. Your membership is active and ready to use. Start managing your business!

guest_booking_confirmation.subject: Your Appointment Has Been Confirmed 📅
guest_booking_confirmation.title: Appointment Confirmed!
guest_booking_confirmation.message: Your appointment has been successfully confirmed. We look forward to seeing you at the scheduled date and time.
guest_booking_confirmation.qrInstructions: Present this QR code upon arrival or enter the code manually if the QR doesn't work.
guest_booking_confirmation.claimMessage: Would you like to create your Bookealo account to manage your appointments?
guest_booking_confirmation.info: 💡 You can create your account at any time using the button above. This will allow you to view and manage all your appointments from one place.
